message:
fix(demo): Improve demo screens with mouse support, performance tuning, and UX polish

File Browser:
- Add mouse click support for panel switching (tree, picker, preview)
- Store layout rects in Cell<Rect> fields for hit testing
- Allow bare arrow keys (not just Ctrl+arrows) for panel switching
- Update keybinding help text to show "←/→ or h/l"
- Fix content width calculation to prevent border overdraw

Dashboard:
- Fix alert indicator colors: use theme::intent::ERROR/WARNING/INFO
  constants instead of _text() variants for proper alpha blending
- Improve code formatting for long expressions

Macro Recorder:
- Handle KeyEventKind::Repeat in addition to Press for smoother UX
- Add "Quick Start" help line with Enter/Space/Arrow instructions
- Increase controls panel height from 5 to 6 for new help line

Markdown Rich Text:
- Increase STREAM_SPEED_MULTIPLIER from 9 to 27 for faster streaming demo
- Clamp rule width to panel width to prevent overflow
- Truncate wrapped markdown to panel width to avoid border overdraw

Visual Effects:
- Add adaptive step scaling for spiral effect on large screens
  (step ≥2 for >12k cells, step ≥3 for >20k cells)
- Cap star rendering to quality-dependent limits (3000/2000/1200)
- Use separate spin_update_stride (2x update_stride) for spin lattice
  to reduce computation on large displays

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
